docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-08-2025 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO JAN-07-2026 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS RONALD DAVID LENATTI AND ZACHARY QUAN ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANTS ANDREW PENN AND KATHLEEN CALLAHAN ARE PRESENT AND READY TO PROCEED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: C. CHENG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-21-2025 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO OCT-08-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANTS NEED TIME TO REVIEW PLAINTIFFS' EXHIBITS. PROOF OF SERVICE FOR THIS HEARING DATE HAS ALREADY BEEN WAIVED IN COURT. BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF RONALD DAVID LENATTI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY LENATTI, RONALD DAVID QUAN, ZACHARY AS TO DEFENDANT PENN, ANDREW CALLAHAN, KATHLEEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-21-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF JAN-07-2026 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
